    Index

    A B C D E F G H I M N O P R S T U V X Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    I

    incrementCurFloor() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Advances the tracking index for the player's active floor map level, capped at the defined upper bound number of maximum floors.
    incrementTurn() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
    Increments the total running turn engine index step count by one.
    isCompleted(PlayableChar) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Evaluates dungeon completion by checking the termination status of the final floor within the array stack.
    isDestructible() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
    Checks if the node can be broken or extracted.
    isPassable() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
    Checks if characters can move across this space.
    Item - Class in Item_Classes
    Represents the base blueprint for all inventory items within the game.
    Item(String) - Constructor for class Item_Classes.Item
    Constructs a baseline item with a name, defaulting its currency price tracking to zero.
    Item(String, int) - Constructor for class Item_Classes.Item
    Constructs an item setting up both its specific name designation and default store price.
    Item_Classes - package Item_Classes
